title: Disengaging from an Immoral and AI Saturated Society
description: Only way to Remain Human We have arrived at the definitive parting of the ways. Two roads diverging at right angles: one signposted Real Life and the other Fake Life. No half way house. That’s important, because at present many are trying to walk a non-committed, neither one nor the [...] The post Disengaging from an Immoral and AI Saturated Society appeared first on Activist Post .

title: Hasbro forms Sixth Wall AI studio to license character behavior and voices
description: Sixth Wall introduces “behavioral licensing” for how characters speak and act in AI experiences, plus an ElevenLabs marketplace

title: US insurance regulators examine credit risk of AI data centre private debt
description: US regulators are reviewing AI data center debt, now 20% of life insurers' bond portfolios. The NAIC may force insurers to hold more capital if risk is understated.

title: Zuckerberg Rules Out More Meta Layoffs In 2026, Admits Mistakes In AI Workforce Overhaul
description: (MENAFN - IANS) New Delhi, June 13 (IANS) Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has told employees that the company made–mistakes– in reshaping its workforce around artificial intelligence, adding that further ...

title: One year after AI 171 crash, questions persist
description: The concerns raised by the Federation of Indian Pilots — selective disclosure of information, the apparent absence of key subject-matter experts from the investigation and an inadequate examination of a possible electrical or systems failure — deserve serious attention
